problem id: 6728c338
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHL(7)

examples:
  00000011 -> 11100000
  00001011 -> 11100001
  00011110 -> 11000011
  10101010 -> 01010101
  11110100 -> 10011110
  00001111 -> 01100001
  10101101 -> 00110101
  01001111 -> 01101001
  00000100 -> 10000000
  01001100 -> 10001001

query: 10011101
predicted answer: 00110011
